answer: Metadata extraction success rate dropped because the concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown, so the pipeline used body_text_only instead of yaml_frontmatter; the fix was enabling YAML frontmatter parsing on non-index Markdown files, verified by concept-fm-canary-pass.

facts.remediation: enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files
facts.root_cause: concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown
